description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front features a double garage and a paved driveway, flanked by several trees and a small landscaped area. There is a spacious balcony or terrace on the upper floor, partially furnished and accessible from inside. The house is surrounded by a mix of green and white-leaved trees, enhancing its curb appeal and providing some privacy. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, white two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, a double garage, and landscaped trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side and partial rear of the house, revealing a balcony, interior rooms, and several trees adjacent to the structure.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side elevation with a clear view of the balcony, large windows, and a row of trees lining the property.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front facade, highlighting the double garage, main entryway, driveway, and symmetrical tree placement.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side of the house, with vertical window strips and more trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Double garage with a paved driveway, main door recessed with minimal overhang, flanked by trees and a small walkway
